name: Galloping Horses
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Add pork and garlic; cook until the meat changes color from pink to brown and most of the fat has been rendered out.
2. Stir in sugar and black pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes more. Add peanuts and stir well until combined.
3. Remove the mixture from the heat and let it cool to room temperature.
4. Arrange lettuce leaves on a platter as a base.
5. For the pineapple, remove any top leaves and outer skin as thinly as possible, cutting downward in spiral patterns.
6. Slice the pineapple into about 5 or 6 wedges, then cut each wedge into thin slices measuring approximately 1/4 inch thick.
7. Place the fruit slices on the platter.
8. Spoon the meat mixture onto the fruit and garnish with mint leaves, cilantro leaves, and jalapeo chile peppers. Serve at room temperature or chilled.
